title: Instagram Running Influencer Email Extractor
description: Scrapes Instagram users posting about running, marathon, and halfmarathon. Filters by minimum follower count and extracts email addresses from bios and linked websites.

hashtags.title: Hashtags to search
hashtags.description: List of Instagram hashtags to scrape (without the # symbol). The actor will find users posting under these tags.

minFollowers.title: Minimum follower count
minFollowers.description: Only save profiles with at least this many followers.

maxResults.title: Maximum results
maxResults.description: Stop after saving this many qualifying profiles.

sessionId.title: Instagram Session ID (sessionid cookie)
sessionId.description: Your Instagram 'sessionid' cookie value. Strongly recommended — without it, Instagram will aggressively rate-limit requests. To get it: log into Instagram in Chrome → F12 → Application → Cookies → instagram.com → copy the 'sessionid' value. Keep this private.

csrfToken.title: Instagram CSRF Token (csrftoken cookie) — optional
csrfToken.description: Your Instagram 'csrftoken' cookie value. Optional, but helps when combined with sessionId. Get it the same way as sessionId.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies are strongly recommended for Instagram. Defaults to Apify Residential proxy.
